item:
Auto switch
(can the engine automatically switch from reading snapshot data to reading incremental data?)

Schema/database inclusion/exclusion
(can the user specify what schema/database to include/exclude from a table to be replicated?)

Table inclusion/exclusion
(can the user specify what tables to include/exclude in the replication process?)

Column inclusion/exclusion
(can the user specify what fields/columns to include/exclude from a table to be replicated?)

Multi database/table replication
(can the engine replicate multiple databases/tables in 1 job?)
Flink:
%U%[

Only possible with DataStream API; Table/SQL API monitors changes on a single table only

](https://ververica.github.io/flink-cdc-connectors/master/content/about.html?#features)

item:
DDL forward
(does the connector optionally have a mechanism to forward changes in the database schema?)

Minimal manual intervention
(can users use a single line of code to synchronize the database; for example in SQL syntax; [see Alibaba CDAS & CTAS advanced features](https://segmentfault.com/a/1190000042385390/en) & [Link](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/realtime-compute-for-apache-flink/latest/synchronization-templates) & [Link](https://help.aliyun.com/document_detail/374304.html?spm=a2c4g.11186623.0.0.daf53a8dRyeonH))
Flink: 4* Users need to define a DDL and query for each table when using the Table (SQL) API

item:
Metadata automatic discovery
(can the engine automatically create destination tables without the user manually mapping schemas for each table? [See Alibaba advanced Flink CDC features](https://www.alibabacloud.com/blog/598910))

Automatic synchronization of table structure changes
(can the engine automatically [See Alibaba advanced Flink CDC features]([

Using Flink Catalog

](https://www.alibabacloud.com/blog/598910))

Initial snapshot in incremental snapshot mode
(can the engine do a initial snapshot using the incremental snapshot algorithm?)

Parallel snapshot reading per table
(can the engine replicate 1 table in parallel by chunks?)

Lock-free reading
(can the engine avoid acquiring a global read lock during snapshotting and thus avoid user lock permissions)

Checkpointing
(can the engine provide the ability to perform checkpoint in chunk level?/is it possible to pause and resume during snapshotting?)
